  (enumeration : FinEnum α) →
    (p : α → Prop) →
      (motive : Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult enumeration.orderedValues p → Sort u_2) →

          ((value : α) →
              (member : value ∈ enumeration.orderedValues) →

                motive (Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult.absent absentProof)) →
              motive x
